OVERVIEW
This is the book that launched Grant Cardone’s 10X Movement. It’s an international
bestseller, but despite widespread commercial success, 10X Rule has been sold more
times via our funnels than Amazon and all other sources combined.
This product funnel uses a strategy that is referred to as “Free + Shipping”. What that
means is that the only cost to the buyer is the shipping and handling fee, which in this
case is $7.95. The reality is that this is no different than if the book was marketed as
costing $7.95 with free shipping and handling. It just converts higher presented in the
way.
One of the biggest takeaways from this funnel is how well it monetizes a low-price
offer. After the initial book sale and optional “bump” offer, the user is taken down a
series of one-click upsells. There are three one-click upsells in total...
This funnel represents Grants sales style. It shows that if you can make an irresistible
front-end offer, you can turn it into significant money by adding on additional
products and services.
OFFER: 10X RULE BOOK

-- 1 of 7 --

GENERAL NOTE
This page uses Clickfunnel’s two-step order form which captures the user’s info in step
1 and then payment info in step 2. Note that on the 2nd step there is a “bump” offer
checkbox. This allows the user to add an audiobook for only $4.95. While this seems
like a small amount, because the conversion rate is so high on the free book offer,
adding this bump makes the average cart value significantly higher.
BOOK SALES PAGE
10xresource.com/10xrule
1
[SFSF Webinar 2 on laptop]
ADVANCED NOTE
A major advantage of using a two-step checkout is that it allows you to capture email
from people who don’t end up purchasing (which on this page is about 60% of
people). Not only is the email valuable for other marketer purposes, it also allows us
to send a sequence of shopping cart abandoner emails to pick up more sales.

-- 2 of 7 --

GENERAL NOTE
The user can choose to either click the button to upgrade their order with one-click, or
choose “no thanks” to go to the next upsell page. This product was chosen as the first
upsell because of its high conversion rate. The subject matter and pricepoint are
perfect, given the low price of the initial book offer.
$47 “WEALTH CREATION” UPSELL
10xresource.com/sf24
2
TECHNOLOGY NOTE
Adding one-click upsells is easy with Clickfunnels. Simply choose an “OTO Page”
(one-time offer) and put it after the initial order form page. The user is able to
upgrade their order in one click without re-entering their payment information.
© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.

-- 3 of 7 --

GENERAL NOTE
Again, the user can choose to either click the button to upgrade their order with
one-click, or choose “no thanks” to go to the next upsell page. After split testing we
decided to again go with the $47 price point on this upsell. Note that if your initial
order is higher, you may want to have higher priced upsells. Other good prices are $97
and $197.

GENERAL NOTE
This last upsell is different in that there is no immediate charge, but rather it is a
14-day trial to a subscription. Free trial upsells have high conversion and produce
great residual income. The user can choose to either click the button to enroll in
the trial, or choose “no thanks” to complete the process.

GENERAL NOTE
The last page shows a summary of the order. Clickfunnels will automatically
display all purchases, including the one-click upsells. As you’ll notice, we also put
a survey on this page. This is done to better segment the list and serve the client.
It also will send qualified people to apply for mentoring services or speak to a
corporate sales representative.
